holdings.infoBox: GEOA is an equity ETF with a total of 67 individual holdings. The top holdings are Meta Platforms stock at 4.41%, Tokyo Electron at 3.69%, Alphabet at 3.01%, Marathon Petroleum at 2.85%, and Sumitomo at 2.81%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree GeoAlpha Opportunities Fund (GEOA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the WisdomTree GeoAlpha Opportunities index. The fund tracks an index that provides exposure to companies of various market capitalization from around the world. The fund selects and weights investments based on fundamentals and opportunities from geopolitical shifts. GEOA was launched on Jul 8, 2025 and is issued by WisdomTree.

data.title: WisdomTree Launches GeoAlpha Opportunities Fund (GEOA)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--WisdomTree, Inc. (NYSE: WT), a global financial innovator, today announced the launch of the WisdomTree GeoAlpha Opportunities Fund (GEOA or “the Fund”) on the New York Stoc...
